title: Tax Free Shopping in Berlin - Quick Summary
items: **Tax Free shopping in Berlin means a VAT refund on eligible goods, not an automatic 19% discount at the till.**
**You usually need permanent residence outside the EU, a participating shop, eligible retail goods and one receipt of at least EUR 50.01 including VAT.**
**Services do not count:** hotels, restaurants, train tickets, tours, museum tickets and food eaten in Germany are not normal Tax Free shopping purchases.
**Ask for the tax-free form before or during purchase,** then keep the form, receipt, passport, travel documents and unused goods together.
**Customs validation is mandatory before leaving the EU.** At BER, checked baggage and hand luggage can send you to different customs points, so decide before packing.
**Your real payout is usually lower than the VAT inside the price,** because shops or refund operators may deduct fees.
